output.value: [if(equals(parameters('comp'), 'resourceType'), parameters('rtCode'), if(equals(parameters('comp'), 'purpose'), parameters('component'), if(equals(parameters('comp'), 'location'), parameters('loc'), if(equals(parameters('comp'), 'freeform1'), parameters('ff1'), if(equals(parameters('comp'), 'environment'), parameters('env'), if(equals(parameters('comp'), 'freeform2'), parameters('ff2'), if(equals(parameters('comp'), 'workload'), parameters('workload'), '')))))))]

[join(filter(map(parameters('components'), lambda('comp', __bicep.resolveComponent(lambdaVariables('comp'), parameters('rtCode'), parameters('component'), parameters('loc'), parameters('ff1'), parameters('env'), parameters('ff2'), parameters('workload')))), lambda('s', not(empty(lambdaVariables('s'))))), parameters('delimiter'))]

[__bicep.buildCustomName(filter(parameters('components'), lambda('s', not(equals(lambdaVariables('s'), 'none')))), parameters('delimiter'), parameters('rtCode'), parameters('component'), parameters('loc'), parameters('ff1'), parameters('env'), parameters('ff2'), parameters('workload'))]

metadata.description:
Naming convention controlling how infrastructure resources are named.
Should match the convention used when deploying the host pool. Pre-populated from the
hpNamingComponents, hpNamingDelimiter, and hpNamingWorkload tags on the hosts resource group.
The host pool base name / identifier (e.g. desktop-01). Pre-populated from the hpIdentifier tag on the hosts resource group.
The pre-computed region abbreviation for the function app deployment location.
A 6-character unique string scoped to the virtual machines subscription and resource group.

variables.storageRawName: [__bicep.cnv(variables('cnv_components'), variables('cnv_delimiter'), '', format('{0}shr{1}', variables('sanitizedStorageId'), parameters('uniqueString')), variables('loc'), variables('cnv_ff1'), variables('cnv_env'), variables('cnv_ff2'), variables('cnv_workload'))]

functionAppName.value: [take(__bicep.cnv(variables('cnv_components'), variables('cnv_delimiter'), variables('cnv_rtCodes').functionApps, variables('hpPurpose'), variables('loc'), variables('cnv_ff1'), variables('cnv_env'), variables('cnv_ff2'), variables('cnv_workload')), 60)]

storageEncryptionIdentityName.value: [__bicep.cnv(variables('cnv_components'), variables('cnv_delimiter'), variables('cnv_rtCodes').userAssignedIdentities, format('{0}-shr{1}-encryption', parameters('identifier'), parameters('uniqueString')), variables('loc'), variables('cnv_ff1'), variables('cnv_env'), variables('cnv_ff2'), variables('cnv_workload'))]

appServicePlanName.value: [__bicep.cnv(variables('cnv_components'), variables('cnv_delimiter'), variables('cnv_rtCodes').appServicePlans, '', variables('loc'), variables('cnv_ff1'), variables('cnv_env'), variables('cnv_ff2'), variables('cnv_workload'))]

appInsightsName.value: [__bicep.cnv(variables('cnv_components'), variables('cnv_delimiter'), variables('cnv_rtCodes').applicationInsights, 'sessionhostreplacer', variables('loc'), variables('cnv_ff1'), variables('cnv_env'), variables('cnv_ff2'), variables('cnv_workload'))]

templateSpecName.value: [__bicep.cnv(variables('cnv_components'), variables('cnv_delimiter'), variables('cnv_rtCodes').templateSpecs, 'session-hosts', variables('loc'), variables('cnv_ff1'), variables('cnv_env'), variables('cnv_ff2'), variables('cnv_workload'))]
